notes: Game doesn't work for me native, but it does on Proton out of the box. I installed manually D9VK, but the game crashed after showing the red screen of the main menu.

notes: Game doesn't work for me native on Linux as mouse input is not recognized. It works out of the box on Proton, but WineD3D has some rendering issues with lightnings. I installed D9VK and it worked much better with this DX9 to Vulkan translation, even when testing it with the new ACO compiler, no graphical glitches
